title: Upper Yard Battles Spread
description: The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Wyper, Chopper, Sanji, Gedatsu, Gan Fall. The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I've been thinking about that, too.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Know what going merry originally looked like?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: 'Cause we're on top of the clouds

summary: The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.
